component.name: EnvStation
component.summary: The missing Control Center for reproducible environments using Distrobox and Devcontainers.

description.p: EnvStation is a modern, fast, and intuitive manager for Distrobox containers. It allows you to visualize, create, and manage your development environments without touching the terminal.

ul.li: List all active and inactive Distrobox containers
Create new environments with a few clicks
Start, stop, and delete containers easily
Seamless integration with your host system via flatpak-spawn

description.p: Perfect for developers on immutable distributions like Bazzite, Fedora Silverblue, or SteamOS.

screenshot.caption: The main dashboard showing all environments

description.p: First stable release with Flatpak support and host communication.
